text: NexaCRM FAQ: What is the price of the Pro plan? — $49 per user per month
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I cancel my subscription? — Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM integrate with Slack? — Yes, native Slack integration is available on all plans
NexaCRM FAQ: Is customer data encrypted at rest? — Yes, all data is encrypted using AES-256
NexaCRM FAQ: What is the free trial period? — 14 days, no credit card required
NexaCRM FAQ: How many users can I add on the Starter plan? — Up to 5 users
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I export my data if I cancel? — Yes, full data export is available for 30 days after cancellation
NexaCRM FAQ: What CRMs can NexaCRM migrate data from? — Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zoho
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a mobile app available? — Yes, available on iOS and Android
NexaCRM FAQ: What happens if I exceed my storage limit? — You will be notified and prompted to upgrade your plan
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I reset my password? — Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the email instructions
NexaCRM FAQ: What is the Enterprise plan price? — Custom pricing, contact sales for a quote
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM support GDPR compliance? — Yes, NexaCRM is fully GDPR compliant
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I use NexaCRM offline? — No, NexaCRM requires an internet connection
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I add a new team member? — Go to Settings > Team > Invite Member and enter their email
NexaCRM FAQ: What file formats can I import contacts from? — CSV, Excel, and vCard formats are supported
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a free plan available? — Yes, a free plan is available for up to 2 users with limited features
NexaCRM FAQ: How long is data retained after account deletion? — Data is retained for 90 days after account deletion before permanent removal
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM integrate with Google Workspace? — Yes, full integration with Gmail, Calendar, and Drive
NexaCRM FAQ: What is the uptime SLA? — 99.9% uptime guaranteed for Pro and Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I customize the CRM pipeline stages? — Yes, pipeline stages are fully customizable on all paid plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I generate a sales report? — Go to Reports > Sales > Select date range > Export
NexaCRM FAQ: Is two-factor authentication available? — Yes, 2FA is available and recommended for all accounts
NexaCRM FAQ: What payment methods are accepted? — Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I contact customer support? — Email support@nexacrm.com or use the live chat in the app
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I integrate NexaCRM with my website? — Yes, via our JavaScript widget or REST API
NexaCRM FAQ: What is the maximum storage per account? — Starter: 5GB, Pro: 50GB, Enterprise: Unlimited
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM have an API? — Yes, a full REST API is available on Pro and Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I bulk delete contacts? — Select contacts using checkboxes, then click Actions > Delete Selected
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I set user permission levels? — Yes, Admin, Manager, and Viewer roles are available
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a limit on email campaigns? — Starter: 1000 emails/month, Pro: 50000 emails/month, Enterprise: Unlimited
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up email automation? — Go to Automation > New Workflow > Select Email trigger
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM support multiple currencies? — Yes, over 50 currencies are supported
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I white-label NexaCRM? — White-labeling is available on the Enterprise plan only
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I upgrade my plan? — Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan
NexaCRM FAQ: What browsers are supported? — Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge are fully supported
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up a custom domain? — Custom domains are available on Pro and Enterprise plans via Settings > Domain
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a knowledge base or help center? — Yes, available at help.nexacrm.com
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I schedule meetings from NexaCRM? — Yes, meeting scheduling integrates with Google Calendar and Outlook
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I track email opens? — Email tracking is enabled by default on Pro and Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: What is the refund policy? — Full refund available within 30 days of purchase
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM support SSO? — Yes, SAML-based SSO is available on Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How many pipelines can I create? — Unlimited pipelines on Pro and Enterprise, 1 pipeline on Starter
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I import data from spreadsheets? — Yes, Excel and CSV imports are supported
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a desktop app? — No desktop app, NexaCRM is fully web-based
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I create a custom report? — Go to Reports > Custom > Add Fields > Save
NexaCRM FAQ: What is the contact storage limit? — Starter: 1000 contacts, Pro: 100000 contacts, Enterprise: Unlimited
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I send SMS from NexaCRM? — Yes, SMS campaigns are available via Twilio integration
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up a sales funnel? — Go to Pipelines > New Pipeline > Add Stages
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM have a Zapier integration? — Yes, NexaCRM connects to 3000+ apps via Zapier
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I archive a contact? — Open the contact profile and click Actions > Archive
NexaCRM FAQ: Is phone support available? — Phone support is available for Enterprise customers only
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I track website visitors in NexaCRM? — Yes, via the NexaCRM web tracking pixel
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I create a contact segment? — Go to Contacts > Segments > New Segment > Add Filters
NexaCRM FAQ: What analytics are available? — Sales analytics, email analytics, pipeline analytics, and custom dashboards
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a sandbox or test environment? — Yes, a sandbox environment is available on Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I enable dark mode? — Go to Settings > Appearance > Theme > Dark
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I create custom fields? — Yes, unlimited custom fields on Pro and Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up a webhook? — Go to Settings > Integrations > Webhooks > Add Webhook
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM support multiple languages? — Yes, available in English, Spanish, French, German, and Japanese
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I merge duplicate contacts? — Go to Contacts > Duplicates > Review > Merge
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I assign tasks to team members? — Yes, tasks can be assigned via the contact or deal view
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there an audit log? — Yes, full audit logs available on Pro and Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up lead scoring? — Go to Settings > Lead Scoring > Add Scoring Rules
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I create email templates? — Yes, unlimited email templates on all paid plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I track deals? — Go to Deals > Pipeline View to see all deals by stage
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM integrate with HubSpot? — Data migration from HubSpot is supported but live sync is not available
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up notifications? — Go to Settings > Notifications > Configure alert preferences
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I run A/B tests on emails? — Yes, A/B testing is available on Pro and Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I create a landing page? — Go to Marketing > Landing Pages > New Page
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a NexaCRM Chrome extension? — Yes, available in the Chrome Web Store for Gmail integration
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set revenue goals? — Go to Reports > Goals > Add Revenue Target
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I create recurring tasks? — Yes, recurring tasks can be set up with custom frequency
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I export contacts? — Go to Contacts > Select All > Export > Choose format
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM support LinkedIn integration? — Yes, LinkedIn Sales Navigator integration is available on Enterprise
NexaCRM FAQ: How long does onboarding take? — Self-service onboarding takes 30 minutes, guided onboarding available for Enterprise
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I track email bounces? — Yes, bounce tracking is automatic on all email campaigns
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I create a contact form? — Go to Marketing > Forms > New Form > Embed on website
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a NexaCRM community forum? — Yes, at community.nexacrm.com
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up multi-step automation? — Go to Automation > New Workflow > Add multiple action steps
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I track phone calls in NexaCRM? — Yes, call logging is available with native VoIP integrations
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I create a deal? — Go to Deals > New Deal > Enter deal name, value, and stage
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM have a forecasting feature? — Yes, revenue forecasting is available on Pro and Enterprise plans
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set user working hours? — Go to Settings > Team > Select User > Set Working Hours
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I create product catalogs? — Yes, product catalogs can be linked to deals on Pro and Enterprise
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I integrate with Stripe? — Go to Settings > Integrations > Stripe > Connect Account
NexaCRM FAQ: Is there a NexaCRM API rate limit? — 1000 requests per hour on Pro, 10000 per hour on Enterprise
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I create a drip campaign? — Go to Automation > Drip Campaigns > New Campaign > Set schedule
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I set deal probability? — Yes, probability can be set per stage or manually per deal
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I remove a team member? — Go to Settings > Team > Select Member > Remove from Team
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM support video calls? — Yes, Zoom and Google Meet integrations are available
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up a chatbot? — Go to Marketing > Chatbot > New Bot > Configure flows
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I track contract status? — Yes, contract tracking with e-signature via DocuSign integration
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up territory management? — Territory management is available on Enterprise plans via Settings > Territories
NexaCRM FAQ: Is NexaCRM SOC 2 certified? — Yes, NexaCRM is SOC 2 Type II certified
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I clone a pipeline? — Go to Pipelines > Select Pipeline > Actions > Duplicate
NexaCRM FAQ: Can I add notes to a contact? — Yes, notes can be added from the contact profile under the Activity tab
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I set up round-robin lead assignment? — Go to Settings > Lead Routing > Round Robin > Add team members
NexaCRM FAQ: Does NexaCRM have a mobile SDK? — Yes, iOS and Android SDKs are available for Enterprise customers
NexaCRM FAQ: How do I view activity history for a contact? — Open the contact profile and click the Activity tab
